finding_results.notes: Restructured all three post-Tuesday sessions so each lands on a distinct dramatic function rather than the repeated ask-list-write ladder. Wednesday (lines 143-207): ends on method discovery — Doug and Simone diagnose that performing kills the material ('That's going to be the whole problem'); the legal pad stays blank, Simone does not write. Thursday (lines 209-313): ends on personal exposure — Doug walks to the second bedroom door, refuses to open it, feels the cold knob; Simone writes once afterward in a single long passage (not the repeated ask/answer/write pattern). Friday (lines 315-431): ends on explicit conflict over authored jokes — Doug's twelve written things fail, he asks Simone to write material for him, she refuses, admits 'I don't know yet'; neither touches the pen. Incorporated snapshot's sharper diagnostic dialogue ('You're telling me what attitude to have about it instead of telling me what happened' at line 175; 'The pattern is you can't do it as somebody else' at line 367). Preserved snapshot's rougher roses coda ('I still don't. But I think about it.' at line 427) over the current chapter's cleaner thesis-like formulation. Cut redundant Wednesday retelling of the umbrella-policy hunt and rose-color question. Cut Thursday's repeated ask/list/write cycles (the 'what else do you keep' inventory, 'parts of you do' thesis-landing). Cut Friday's Roy session, Kroger list, and evening standup-watching/legal-pad-inventory to remove additional instances of the list-and-categorize pattern. Chapter reduced from 564 to 436 lines while preserving all required state deltas, open hooks, and the chapter's engine.

summary: Single finding (ch07-dialogue-01) addressed by restructuring the Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday coaching sessions so each produces a distinct dramatic function — method discovery, personal exposure, and explicit conflict over authored jokes — and no more than one session resolves on the ask/list/Simone-writes pattern (in practice, zero do). Wednesday ends on diagnostic silence with the pad still blank. Thursday ends on Doug's refusal at the second bedroom door, with Simone writing one long passage afterward rather than repeated short notes. Friday ends on an unresolved standoff where Simone admits she does not yet know how to solve the special, followed by the roses coda. Snapshot dialogue textures restored where the current chapter had drifted into cleaner or more thesis-like speech. Chapter compressed from 564 to 436 lines by removing duplicate ask/list/write cycles, redundant retelling, and inventory beats that performed the same dramatic function as beats already established.
